description: Workflow for processing CatFact entity including timestamp set, subscriber fetch, and email sending
name: catfact_workflow

transitions.description: Set timestamp on cat fact if missing
transitions.end_state_description: Timestamp has been set on cat fact
transitions.name: set_timestamp

transitions.description: Fetch subscribers for sending cat fact
transitions.end_state_description: Subscribers have been fetched and attached to cat fact
transitions.name: fetch_subscribers
transitions.start_state_description: Timestamp has been set on cat fact

transitions.description: Send cat fact emails to subscribers and increment counter
transitions.end_state_description: Emails sent to subscribers and counter incremented
transitions.name: send_emails
transitions.start_state_description: Subscribers have been fetched and attached to cat fact
